languages.text: "Мне доложили, что капитан-интендант взяла группу лучших разведчиков и пошла к руинам, Ваша Светлость".
"I have been informed that the captain-quartermaster took a group of our finest scouts and headed toward the ruins, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: "Мне доложили, что капитан-интендант взяла группу лучших разведчиков и пошла к руинам, Ваша Светлость".

"I have been informed that the captain-quartermaster took a group of our finest scouts and headed toward the ruins, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: “根据我接到的消息，军需官上尉带着我们最精锐的一队侦察兵，朝那片遗迹去了，大人。”
languages.original_text: "I have been informed that the captain-quartermaster took a group of our finest scouts and headed toward the ruins, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: “根据我接到的消息，军需官上尉带着我们最精锐的一队侦察兵，朝那片遗迹去了，大人。”

languages.text: "Levazımcı Yüzbaşı'nın en iyi keşifçilerimizden oluşan bir grup alıp harabelere doğru yola çıktığı bilgisini aldım {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: "I have been informed that the captain-quartermaster took a group of our finest scouts and headed toward the ruins, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "Levazımcı Yüzbaşı'nın en iyi keşifçilerimizden oluşan bir grup alıp harabelere doğru yola çıktığı bilgisini aldım {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: « On m'a informé que la capitaine-quartier-maître était partie pour les ruines avec un groupe de nos meilleurs éclaireurs, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: "I have been informed that the captain-quartermaster took a group of our finest scouts and headed toward the ruins, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: « On m'a informé que la capitaine-quartier-maître était partie pour les ruines avec un groupe de nos meilleurs éclaireurs, Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: «Me han informado de que la capitana intendente se ha llevado a un grupo de nuestros mejores exploradores hacia las ruinas, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: "I have been informed that the captain-quartermaster took a group of our finest scouts and headed toward the ruins, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: «Me han informado de que la capitana intendente se ha llevado a un grupo de nuestros mejores exploradores hacia las ruinas, mi{mf|lord|lady}».

languages.text: "Ich wurde informiert, dass die Captain-Quartiermeisterin mit einigen unserer besten Späher zu den Ruinen aufgebrochen ist, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: "I have been informed that the captain-quartermaster took a group of our finest scouts and headed toward the ruins, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "Ich wurde informiert, dass die Captain-Quartiermeisterin mit einigen unserer besten Späher zu den Ruinen aufgebrochen ist, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."

languages.text: 「船長兼大尉が、我々の精鋭斥候隊を率いて、遺跡へ向かっているとのことです、貴{mf|殿|女}様。」
languages.original_text: "I have been informed that the captain-quartermaster took a group of our finest scouts and headed toward the ruins, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: 「船長兼大尉が、我々の精鋭斥候隊を率いて、遺跡へ向かっているとのことです、貴{mf|殿|女}様。」
